name: agentfactory-business
description: Business domain agent plugins from The AI Agent Factory — Part 3: Business Domain Agent Workflows

plugins.name: islamic-finance
plugins.description: Jurisdiction-aware Islamic finance agent: 12 product skills, 13 jurisdiction overlays, 4 domain commands. AAOIFI, IFRS, local standards across 20 jurisdictions.

plugins.name: idfa-financial-architect
plugins.description: Intent-Driven Financial Architecture (IDFA) — a financial modeling language that replaces Excel cell references with Named Ranges. Four guardrails, three layers, five core skills.

plugins.name: banking
plugins.description: Jurisdiction-aware banking regulatory agent: 16 product skills, 7 jurisdiction overlays, 4 domain commands. IFRS 9 ECL, Basel III/IV capital and liquidity, AML/KYC/sanctions, bank reconciliation across UK, EU, US, Australia, Singapore, UAE, Pakistan.

plugins.name: legal-ops
plugins.description: Legal Operations and Compliance agent: 9 skills (router + 8 products), 6 jurisdiction overlays, 4 domain commands. Contract review, NDA triage, IP protection, regulatory monitoring, DSAR management, legal spend, compliance calendar, contract intake across UK, EU, US, Pakistan, UAE, and GCC.

plugins.name: sales-revops-marketing
plugins.description: Sales, RevOps & Marketing agent: 14 product skills, 5 agent skills, 4 jurisdiction overlays, 4 domain commands. Prospect research, lead scoring, outreach, sequences, pipeline analysis, content creation, campaign planning, and RevOps agents across US, EU, Pakistan, and GCC jurisdictions.

plugins.name: supply-chain
plugins.description: Supply chain and procurement intelligence: 8 skills, 5 persistent agents. Vendor assessment (Kraljic 6-dimension), invoice reconciliation (3-way match), supplier risk monitoring, logistics optimization, spend analytics, network design, and vendor communications.

plugins.name: product-strategy
plugins.description: Product management agent: 6 skills, 3 agents. Discovery briefs, user research interview guides, PRDs, RICE prioritization, sprint retrospectives, and user story generation.

plugins.name: hr-operations
plugins.description: People & HR operations agent: 5 skills, 4 agents. Job description generation, candidate matching, knowledge management, offboarding workflows, and reference letter generation.

plugins.name: operations-intelligence
plugins.description: Operations management agent: 4 skills, 4 agents. Process audit, contract management, incident response, and operational metrics dashboards.

plugins.name: agentic-office
plugins.description: Productivity & agentic office agent: 10 skills, 4 agents. Context loading, delegation, daily digest, executive briefs, meeting intelligence, progress tracking, task intelligence, and workplace search.

plugins.name: innovation
plugins.description: Intrapreneurship & innovation agent: 10 skills, 4 agents. Business model canvas, customer discovery, financial modeling, go-to-market strategy, hypothesis testing, ideation, market analysis, pitch deck, design sprints, and validation.
